title: Researchers’ access to information from regulated services
body: "Section 162 of the Online Safety Act 2023 requires Ofcom to produce a report about researchers’ access to information:   describing how, and to what extent, persons carrying out independent research into online safety matters are currently able to obtain information from providers of regulated services to inform their research, exploring the legal and other issues which currently constrain the sharing of information for such purposes assessing the extent to which greater access to information for such purposes might be achieved.   Ofcom published this report on 8 July and it has been laid before parliament in accordance with section 162(5) of the Online Safety Act. "
